title: Cobblemon Pokemon Badges
description: This mod adds all main-line Pokemon badges into Minecraft!
body:
Pokemon Badges - in cobblemon!

This mod adds all of the badges from the Indigo, Johto, Hoenn, Sinnoh, Unova, Kalos, and Galar leagues for your enjoyment and delight.

Available on Fabric and NeoForge, and compatible with Cobblemon.

All design credits go to [SireSolo](https://discord.gg/HDbp3hVsKK) - thanks for giving me permission to make this.
